title: Verify content is accessible and playable during an active trial
description: Test that a user with an active trial can access and play premium content from the Trial Corner and other parts of the app.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
2. Click on a content thumbnail from the 'Trending' section.
3. Verify the content details page opens.

expected_result: The premium content starts playing without any restrictions.
